text: AWS Glue @ rsssamasn @ s e Serverless ETL (Extract, Transform & Load) e .. vs datapipeline (which can do ETL) and uses servers (EMR) * Moves and transforms data between source and destination e Crawls data sources and generates the AWS Glue Data catalog e Data Source: Stores : S3, RDS, JDBC Compatible & DynamoDB e Data Source : Streams : Kinesis Data Stream & Apache Kafka e Data Targets : S3, RDS, JDBC Databases
